content:
hihi! I'm valentine! 
English is my native language, but I can also read/speak a bit of German.
I've been in academic writing and literature review/analysis for almost six years for my degrees lol
I may not be able to translate other languages, but I can help with proofreading, testing, etc. Honestly I'm willing to help anywhere I can, I just want to make the game I love even better o7o)b

Heyo~ 

I'm Kate. English is not my native language, but I work with it constantly in terms of writing/proofreading texts and whatnot. The same goes for my first language, Russian: I worked over checking and editing (and eventually writing articles) texts for about 6 years. 

Morimens is a truly precious project with its intricate lore and wonderful designs - and I feel really honored to get on board. I've never worked on any grand community translation projects before, but I'll do my best!

Hi, I’m Sefa (it reads “seva” since it’s an old English word, btw). I suppose I’m here to do CN -> ZH (Simplified Chinese to Traditional Chinese) proofreading uwu, mainly through the original text itself but sometimes I need more details to check the real meaning of the text—details from the Japanese voice texts, and hopefully the official English translation. I’m not really very good at English to the level I can very long English text but hopefully I’ll get better at reading and co-working in English very soon. Glad to be here uwu
